title: Reportage references --format=json Reference Index
description: External contract for `reportage references --format=json`'s CLI stdout document: the versioned documentation URL index for the running reportage binary. This is an independent contract from the run report document (spec/output/json-report/schema.json) even though both are selected with `--format=json`. The order of `documents[]` is the recommended reading order for AI consumers and is part of the contract. This schema validates output structure only; the repository-existence of `documents[].path` is verified by a separate repository consistency check (crates/reportage-cli/tests/references_index.rs), and tag existence / URL reachability are not verified at all. See docs2/adr/20260708T180000Z_ai-documentation-discovery-core-path.md and issues #137 and #166.

schema_version.description: Version of this reference index contract.

name.description: The binary/tool name, not the Rust package name.

version.description: The runtime version of the reportage binary that produced this index.

tag.description: The git tag the URLs point at: identical to `version`, with no `v` prefix. Built mechanically from `version`; its existence is not verified.

documents.description: The documentation URL index, in the recommended reading order for AI consumers. `id` values are unique within the array (cross-item uniqueness is enforced by CI, not expressible here).

id.description: Stable identifier for the document. Survives title and path renames.

path.description: Repository-root-relative path of the document inside the tooppoo/reportage repository.

human.description: GitHub rendered-view URL for human readers, built from the unprefixed tag.

ai.description: Raw source URL for AI consumers, built from the unprefixed tag.

command.description: The CLI invocation to run after editing a `.repor` file. Always an invocation that exists in the reportage version that produced this index.
